creator: vwe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Arne: I'm sorry to see your issue still being there. 
By quickly checking your ktrace output and bring that in line 
with the source code, I'm unable to see much causes for a fault. 
If an internal error has been caught, there must have been an 
error message at stderr. 
I'm wondering if you've done `cd /usr/src; make check-old` 
after installing your new world? Did you follow the documented 
upgrade procedure? 
Or is your issue already solved?
